panels.title: Useful first. Honest about what the website is and is not proving.
panels.summary: SpeakLocal keeps the website phone-forward and app-aligned: selected starter preview modules on the site, site audio only where the export says it is ready, and the deeper do-not-get-stuck backup in the app.

facts.label: Selected from
facts.body: Selected starter preview modules from the live Viet pack, not a full public phrase directory.

facts.label: Audio rule
facts.body: Site audio appears only where the module export marks clips ready for that block.

facts.label: Freshness rule
facts.body: Module cards carry the export date so "updated" means the export changed, not vague recency copy.

facts.label: App boundary
facts.body: Deeper search, saved phrases, offline use, and wider phrase coverage stay in the app on purpose.

actions.label: Report a phrase or audio gap
